hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"Stop","additionalContext":"Before stopping: (1) Append latest attempts and findings to notes.md (2) Commit notes + any changes if uncommitted"}}'
echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreCompact","additionalContext":"Context is about to be compacted. Before losing history: commit all uncommitted notes.md and report.md changes NOW."}}'
